common.let-ai-finish-the-code-for-you: Let AI finish the code for you
common.to-request-ai-to-complete-your-code: To request AI to complete your code, you must add a comment at the beginning of your code that specifies the programming language you are using. You can choose from a range of options including Dart, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, Swift, Java, Kotlin, C/C++, and Go. Additionally, you need to add a comment to describe the functionality you wish AI to complete.
common.function-name-sum: a function name 'sum',  that returns the sum of two numbers

common.to-request-AI-to-fix-or-edit-your-code: To request AI to fix or edit your code, you must add one or more TODO comments in the code. This will help AI understand what need to do
common.the-first-line-of-the-comment: The first line of the comment specifies the language of the code. You can choose from dart, javascript, typescript, python, php, swift, java, kotlin, C/C++, Go.
common.translate-your-code-to-another-language: To request AI to translate your coding or natural language to another language.
common.translate-first-line-of-the-comment: The first line of the comment specifies the language of the code. You can choose from natural, dart, javascript, typescript, python, php, swift, java, kotlin, C/C++, Go.
common.footer-menu-description: Acquire the essential skills and knowledge to kickstart your career and set off on a new path in the age of AI.
common.at-juniorit-ai: Do you know that learning coding can be pretty easy in the age of ChatGPT? We will teach you all the core skills you need to learn in university in just 6 months even if you have no prior coding experience, which would typically take 4 years in a university setting.
common.through-ai-powered: Moreover, there is a significant gap between the University curriculum and industry standards. This means there are many skills, software, and tools used in the work environment that you cannot learn from school, and mastering them often requires an additional 2 years. With ChatGPT and JuniorIT.AI, the magic happens now.
common.upon-being-assigned: When you're given real-world projects, just like in an IT software company, you'll experience every stage of software development - from learning and researching to developing and debugging. In just a few months, you'll transform into a skilled full-stack senior software engineer and even be able to create a private smart home security mobile app for your family. If you want to go further, you can even learn to develop security camera firmware using C/C++.
common.comprehensive-set-of-technologies: You will learn a complete range of technologies and resources to help you grow your skills and expertise, preparing you for success in the tech industry
